name: cortex
description: Local, repo-scoped context platform for coding assistants. Semantic search, graph relationships, and architectural rule context for your codebase.

tools.name: context.search
tools.description: Semantic search across codebase entities (files, rules, ADRs)

tools.name: context.get_related
tools.description: Get related entities via graph relationships

tools.name: context.get_rules
tools.description: Get active architectural rules and decisions

tools.name: context.reload
tools.description: Reload context graph after code changes

features: Semantic codebase search with graph-aware ranking
Graph relationships between files, rules, and ADRs
Experimental call graph APIs for function-level tracing and impact analysis (JS/TS semantic chunking builds)
Local & private (no cloud, your code stays on your machine)
